privileged_info_summary: The compile_audit_report task queries a real, self-hosted Nx Witness VMS instance (version 5.1.5.39242 or 6.0.1.39873, downloaded from official NetworkOptix distribution at updates.networkoptix.com). The VMS system is named 'GymAnythingVMS' and runs at https://localhost:7001 with admin credentials admin/Admin1234!. The system contains 5 synthetic test cameras (Parking Lot, Entrance, Server Room, Lobby, Loading Dock) created by testcamera tool, and 5 synthetic test users (security.operator, camera.admin, site.manager, john.smith, sarah.jones). The task requires querying REST API v1 endpoints to compile a compliance audit report in JSON format at /home/ga/Documents/compliance_report.json. CRITICAL NOTE: The task.json file is malformed and incomplete, ending mid-description without valid JSON or metadata section.
